Class AbstractGun

java.lang.Object
game.entities.weapons.AbstractGun
All Implemented Interfaces:
Gun
Direct Known Subclasses:
MachineGun, PistolGun, RifleGun, ShotgunGun
public abstract class AbstractGun extends Object implements Gun
Base implementation for guns that fire projectile bullets.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractGun

      protected AbstractGun(String label, long durationMillis, long cooldownMillis, double bulletSpeed, double forceX, double forceY, double renderWidth, String spritePath)
      Creates a gun with shared stats and rendering metadata.
      Parameters:
      label - display name used in the UI
      durationMillis - how long the weapon stays equipped after pickup
      cooldownMillis - delay between consecutive shots
      bulletSpeed - horizontal bullet speed
      forceX - horizontal knockback force from bullet hits
      forceY - vertical knockback force from bullet hits
      renderWidth - preferred sprite render width
      spritePath - classpath resource path to the gun sprite

    • createBullet

      protected final Bullet createBullet(Player owner, double muzzleX, double muzzleY, int facingDirection, double verticalSpeed)
      Creates a bullet with optional vertical speed and unlimited range.
      Parameters:
      owner - player that fired the bullet
      muzzleX - spawn x-coordinate
      muzzleY - spawn y-coordinate
      facingDirection - horizontal direction (-1 or 1)
      verticalSpeed - vertical bullet speed
      Returns:
      created bullet instance

    • createBullet

      protected final Bullet createBullet(Player owner, double muzzleX, double muzzleY, int facingDirection, double verticalSpeed, double maxTravelDistance)
      Creates a bullet with optional vertical speed and a maximum travel distance.
      Parameters:
      owner - player that fired the bullet
      muzzleX - spawn x-coordinate
      muzzleY - spawn y-coordinate
      facingDirection - horizontal direction (-1 or 1)
      verticalSpeed - vertical bullet speed
      maxTravelDistance - maximum distance the bullet can travel
      Returns:
      created bullet instance
